calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Rachel Hanley, Esq. 714-446-6686 Winn law Group for ASSIGNEE CALVARY SPV I, LLC.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. Ms. Hanley informs the Court their papers have been rejected by the clerk's office. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ASSIGNEE CALVARY SPV I, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc.

Granted. Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
